_publications._publicationTitle: Mass spectrometric insights into the protein composition of human cutaneous neurofibromas: comparison of neurofibromas with the overlying skin.

_contextSnippet: We performed mass spectrometry analysis of 15 cNFs and matched samples of the overlying skin from four individuals with NF1
details: Successfully performed mass spectrometry analysis of 15 cNFs and matched skin samples from four individuals, enabling detection of protein expression differences and GO term analysis
